steps.title: Trace the structure
steps.content: Sentence 1 describes the reissue project. Sentence 2 introduces Rutigliano and other scholars' stance — citing "a lack of nuance and erasure of intention" — and then explains their reasoning ("what may have been a constraint for some was an elective exercise...").

steps.title: Match the structure to a choice
steps.content:
Choice A captures this exactly: project described, scholars' stance introduced, support for that stance expressed.

  • B introduces a question that isn't raised
  • C calls the work part of "a literary movement" — not in the text
  • D says scholars made an assertion (the project did
, the scholars countered it).

That matches choice A — A is correct.
